meta.notes: Beat Swarm Music Lab intensity audition: intro set piece, then low, medium, build, peak, release, and settle arrangement levels. Expected: the intro continues normally into the audition; later stages add denser rhythm/lead/support/ornament layers and release strips back.

level1ArrangementMusicality.reason: Intensity audition uses a forced lane/layer stack and is validated by musicIntensityAudition instead of the normal arrangement musicality contract.
